# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive
  GIT_DEPTH: 0

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y )'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY")
  - git config --global url."https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/".insteadOf "https://${CI_SERVER_HOST}/"

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
    - echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 1 week

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - npm test || true
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - coverage/
    expire_in: 1 week

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to environment..."
    - echo "Commit Message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - git tag "release-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - git push origin "release-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: $PRODUCTION_URL

notify:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - echo "Sending notification..."
    - |
      curl -X POST \
        -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
        -H "Authorization: Bearer $NOTIFICATION_TOKEN" \
        -d '{
          "message": "Deployment triggered by MR: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE",
          "description": "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION",
          "commit": "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
        }' \
        $NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL
  only:
    - main

security:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Running security checks..."
    - npm audit
    - bandit -r .
    - trivy fs .
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - security-report.json
    expire_in: 1 week

only:
  - merge_requests
  - main

except:
  - schedules
  - tags
